items.title: Retraction Note: The effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization on pain and functional disability in patients with shoulder impingement syndrome; a randomized control clinical trial.
items.summary: A retraction note has been issued for a previously published randomized controlled clinical trial on the effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization for shoulder impingement syndrome.
items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis of 30 studies found that female athletes may have lower return-to-sport rates after primary anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR) compared to male athletes.
items.curatedReason: 系统综述和 Meta 分析揭示了 ACLR 后女性运动员重返运动率低于男性。这意味着你在 ACLR 后康复中，需要特别关注女性患者的潜在性别差异，并调整重返运动策略，可能需要更针对性的心理和社会支持。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建后重返运动是否存在性别差异？一项系统综述和探索性 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 30 项研究的系统综述和探索性 Meta 分析发现，女性运动员在原发性前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）后重返运动的比例可能低于男性运动员。
items.curatedReasonEn: A systematic review and meta-analysis reveal lower return-to-sport rates in female athletes after ACLR compared to males. This means you need to pay special attention to potential sex disparities in female patients during ACLR rehabilitation and adjust return-to-sport strategies, potentially requiring more targeted psychological and social support.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality augmented with conventional physical therapy significantly improved upper extremity function in individuals with subacute stroke compared to conventional therapy alone (p < 0.01 for Fugl-Meyer Assessment-Upper Extremity scores).
items.curatedReason: 智能手机半沉浸式 VR 在亚急性卒中上肢康复中展现出显著优势，比单纯常规 PT 效果更好。这意味着你可以把这类低成本 VR 方案纳入你的卒中康复工具箱，尤其对于资源有限的患者。
items.titleZh: 智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实技术在亚急性卒中患者上肢功能康复中的应用：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，与单纯常规物理治疗相比，结合智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实技术能显著改善亚急性卒中患者的上肢功能（Fugl-Meyer 上肢评定分数 p < 0.01）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Smartphone-based semi-immersive VR shows significant advantages in subacute stroke upper extremity rehabilitation, outperforming conventional PT alone. This means you can integrate such low-cost VR solutions into your stroke rehabilitation toolkit, especially for resource-limited patients.

items.title: School-based Motor Skill Interventions for Children and Adolescents with Developmental Coordination Disorder: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the effects of school-based interventions on motor performance in children and adolescents with developmental coordination disorder.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和 Meta 分析证实了学校体育技能干预对发育性协调障碍儿童和青少年运动表现的有效性。这意味着你在儿童康复中，可以更有信心地与学校合作，推广基于学校的干预方案。
items.titleZh: 针对发育性协调障碍儿童和青少年的学校体育技能干预：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和 Meta 分析调查了学校体育技能干预对发育性协调障碍儿童和青少年运动表现的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the effectiveness of school-based motor skill interventions for improving motor performance in children and adolescents with developmental coordination disorder. This means you can collaborate with schools with greater confidence in pediatric rehabilitation to promote school-based intervention programs.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: The impact of a brief online education intervention on the knowledge, attitudes and beliefs of qualified physiotherapists about chronic low back pain: Pre- and post-intervention survey.
items.summary: A pre- and post-intervention survey found that a brief online education program improved qualified physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs about chronic low back pain, shifting them towards a biopsychosocial approach.
items.curatedReason: 2021 年发表在 BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders 上的一项关于肩峰撞击综合征的文章被撤回。如果你曾引用或参考过该研究，请及时更新你的临床决策依据，因为其结论已不再可靠。
items.titleZh: 撤稿声明：常规物理治疗结合或不结合神经松动术对肩峰撞击综合征患者疼痛和功能障碍的有效性；一项随机对照临床试验。
items.summaryZh: 一篇关于常规物理治疗结合或不结合神经松动术治疗肩峰撞击综合征有效性的随机对照临床试验已被撤稿。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 2021 article on shoulder impingement syndrome published in BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders has been retracted. If you have cited or referenced this study, update your clinical decision-making promptly, as its conclusions are no longer reliable.

items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Effectiveness of passive vs. assistive robotic gait training on functional recovery and neuroplasticity post-stroke: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 48 subacute stroke patients compared passive vs. assistive robotic gait training, showing both modes improved lower limb motor function, with differences in neuroplasticity mechanisms.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 比较了被动式和辅助式机器人步态训练对卒中后功能恢复和神经可塑性的影响。如果你在临床中使用机器人辅助，这份研究为你提供了不同模式选择的证据支持，以优化下肢功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 被动式与辅助式机器人步态训练对卒中后功能恢复和神经可塑性的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 48 例亚急性卒中患者的随机对照试验比较了被动式与辅助式机器人步态训练，结果显示两种模式均能改善下肢运动功能，但在神经可塑性机制上存在差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared passive vs. assistive robotic gait training on post-stroke functional recovery and neuroplasticity. If you use robotic assistance in your clinic, this study provides evidence to support different mode selections for optimizing lower limb functional recovery.

items.title: Association between Patellofemoral Conditions and the Incidence of ACL Injury: Could Patellofemoral Conditions be a Risk Factor for ACL Injury? A 10-year Population-Based Study.
items.summary: A 10-year population-based study found an association between patellofemoral conditions and an increased incidence of ACL injury, suggesting that patellofemoral conditions could be a risk factor.
items.curatedReason: 这项 10 年基于人群的研究表明髌股关节病可能是 ACL 损伤的危险因素。这提示你在评估膝关节疼痛患者时，不仅要处理当前症状，还要考虑髌股病史对未来 ACL 损伤风险的预警意义。
items.titleZh: 髌股关节疾病与 ACL 损伤发生率的关联：髌股关节疾病是否是 ACL 损伤的危险因素？一项 10 年基于人群的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 10 年的基于人群的研究发现，髌股关节疾病与 ACL 损伤发生率增加存在关联，提示髌股关节疾病可能是 ACL 损伤的一个危险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year population-based study suggests patellofemoral conditions might be a risk factor for ACL injury. This indicates that when evaluating knee pain patients, you should not only address current symptoms but also consider the predictive significance of patellofemoral history for future ACL injury risk.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Is Knee Osteoarthritis an Inevitable Consequence for Athletes after Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury?
items.summary: This article discusses that anterior cruciate ligament injury should be viewed as the start of a long-term knee health condition leading to post-traumatic knee osteoarthritis, despite advances in surgical reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤后发展为膝关节骨关节炎的风险是运动康复医生需要长期关注的。这篇文章再次强调了其不可避免性，让你在康复宣教和长期管理方案设计时，更重视预防性策略。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带损伤后，膝骨关节炎是运动员不可避免的后果吗？
items.summaryZh: 文章指出，前交叉韧带损伤应被视为导致创伤后膝骨关节炎的长期膝关节健康问题的开始，即便手术重建已取得进展。
items.curatedReasonEn: The risk of developing knee osteoarthritis after ACL injury is a long-term concern for sports rehabilitation clinicians. This article re-emphasizes its inevitability, prompting you to prioritize preventive strategies in rehabilitation education and long-term management plans.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Many Paths to Recovery: The Case for Treatment Pluralism.
items.summary: A synopsis argues that decades of research have not identified a consistently superior treatment for musculoskeletal pain, with various interventions showing modest, broadly equivalent effects likely mediated by overlapping, nonspecific, and contextual mechanisms, supporting treatment pluralism.
items.curatedReason: 疼痛治疗研究数十年未能找出“最优”方案，各项干预效应量均适中且可能通过非特异性机制发挥作用，这强化了对疼痛治疗“疗法多元化”的呼吁。这意味着你应避免执着于单一“灵丹妙药”，更注重结合多种治疗模式，并善用非特异性及情境因素来优化患者体验和效果。
items.titleZh: 通向康复的多种途径：治疗多元化的案例
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述指出，数十年的研究未能为肌肉骨骼疼痛找到持续优越的治疗方法，各种干预措施显示出适度且大致相当的疗效，可能通过重叠、非特异性和情境机制介导，支持治疗多元化。
items.curatedReasonEn: Decades of pain treatment research have failed to identify a 'superior' treatment, with interventions showing modest effects likely mediated by non-specific mechanisms. This reinforces the call for 'treatment pluralism' in pain management. You should avoid fixating on a single 'magic bullet' and instead focus on integrating multiple modalities, leveraging non-specific and contextual factors to optimize patient experience and outcomes.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Is Knee Osteoarthritis an Inevitable Consequence for Athletes after Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury?
items.summary: A commentary posits that anterior cruciate ligament injury should be viewed as the beginning of a long-term knee joint health condition potentially leading to post-traumatic osteoarthritis, despite advances in surgical reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤后的膝骨关节炎风险已被视为长期并发症，本评论强调了即使手术重建，这种风险依然存在。这意味着你对 ACL 术后患者的康复管理，需从急性损伤恢复转向更长期的关节健康维护和预防策略。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带损伤后膝骨关节炎是否是运动员的必然结果？
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论指出，前交叉韧带损伤应被视为可能导致创伤后膝骨关节炎的长期膝关节健康问题的开端，即使手术重建也未能完全避免。
items.curatedReasonEn: The risk of knee OA after ACL injury is a recognized long-term complication, and this commentary highlights its persistence even after surgical reconstruction. This implies your rehabilitation management for ACL post-op patients needs to shift from acute recovery to long-term joint health maintenance and preventive strategies.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Phenomenological exploration of perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors in patients with knee osteoarthritis during physiotherapy rehabilitation in a low- and middle-income country.
items.summary: This qualitative study explores perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors of physiotherapy rehabilitation in patients with knee osteoarthritis in a low- and middle-income country, identifying lifestyle and contextual factors as key influences.
items.curatedReason: 本研究提供了一项对低收入和中等收入国家膝骨关节炎患者物理治疗康复障碍和促进因素的定性洞察。它提醒你在这些背景下，社会经济和文化因素对患者依从性和感知效果的关键影响，助你更好地调整干预策略。
items.titleZh: 低收入和中等收入国家膝骨关节炎患者物理治疗康复中的感知、经验、促进因素和抑制因素的现象学探索
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探索了低收入和中等收入国家膝骨关节炎患者对物理治疗康复的感知、经验、促进因素和抑制因素，指出生活方式和情境因素是关键影响因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study offers qualitative insights into barriers and facilitators of physiotherapy for knee OA in low- and middle-income countries. It highlights the critical influence of socioeconomic and cultural factors on patient adherence and perceived outcomes in these settings, helping you tailor your intervention strategies more effectively.

items.title: Effect of Femoral Nerve Neurodynamic Techniques on Pain in Patellofemoral Pain Syndrome: A Randomised Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=71) found no additional benefit of femoral nerve neurodynamic techniques on knee pain and function in patients with patellofemoral pain syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 显示股神经神经动力学技术对髌股疼痛综合征的疼痛和功能改善无额外价值。这意味着你在临床实践中，不应过度依赖该技术作为常规干预，而应优先考虑有更强证据支持的运动疗法等手段。
items.titleZh: 股神经神经动力学技术对髌股疼痛综合征疼痛的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=71）发现，股神经神经动力学技术对髌股疼痛综合征患者的膝关节疼痛和功能没有额外益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates no added value of femoral nerve neurodynamic techniques for pain and function in patellofemoral pain syndrome. This means you should not over-rely on this technique as a routine intervention in clinical practice, prioritizing exercise therapy and other evidence-backed methods instead.

items.title: Association Between Postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test Scores and Length of Hospital Stay in Patients with Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Prospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study demonstrated an association between lower postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) scores and longer length of hospital stay in patients with chronic subdural hematoma.
items.curatedReason: Mini-BESTest 评分与慢性硬膜下血肿术后住院时间显著相关，该研究证实了其作为预测工具的潜力。这意味着你在临床中可以使用 Mini-BESTest 早期评估患者的平衡和步态功能，从而更好地预测康复路径和住院时长。
items.titleZh: 慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-BESTest 评分与住院时间之间的关联：一项前瞻性队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究表明，慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-BESTest 评分较低与住院时间延长存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mini-BESTest scores are significantly associated with length of hospital stay after chronic subdural hematoma surgery, confirming its potential as a predictive tool. This means you can use Mini-BESTest in clinical practice for early assessment of balance and gait function, better predicting rehabilitation pathways and hospital duration.

items.title: Core Stability Training for Post-Stroke Recovery: A Multifaceted Approach to Enhance Postural Control and Motor Function.
items.summary: This review explores the multifaceted mechanisms by which Core Stability Training (CST) can enhance postural control and motor function in stroke survivors, aiming to improve their independence and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 核心稳定性训练对中风后体态控制和运动功能有益，本综述再次强化了其多方面机制。你在设计中风康复方案时，应将 CST 作为重要组成部分，以改善患者的独立性和生活质量。
items.titleZh: 中风后康复的核心稳定性训练：增强体态控制和运动功能的多方面方法。
items.summaryZh: 本综述探讨了核心稳定性训练 (CST) 如何通过多方面机制增强中风幸存者的体态控制和运动功能，旨在改善其独立性和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Core stability training benefits postural control and motor function after stroke, and this review reinforces its multifaceted mechanisms. When designing stroke rehabilitation programs, you should include CST as a key component to improve patient independence and quality of life.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Visuospatial Working Memory Predicts Strategic Motor Learning With Visual Feedback During Gait After Stroke.
items.summary: This study found that visuospatial working memory predicts strategic motor learning with visual feedback during gait after stroke, suggesting its role in locomotor learning in this population.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了视空间工作记忆与中风后步态视觉反馈引导的策略性运动学习之间的关联。这意味着你在中风患者步态康复中，需要关注其视空间工作记忆功能，并可能通过针对性训练来优化视觉反馈的效果。
items.titleZh: 视空间工作记忆预测中风后步态视觉反馈引导的策略性运动学习。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，视空间工作记忆可以预测中风后步态视觉反馈引导的策略性运动学习，表明其在该人群步态学习中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals an association between visuospatial working memory and strategic motor learning guided by visual feedback during gait after stroke. This means you need to consider visuospatial working memory function in stroke patients' gait rehabilitation, and potentially optimize the effect of visual feedback through targeted training.

items.title: Association between Patellofemoral Conditions and the Incidence of ACL Injury: Could Patellofemoral Conditions be a Risk Factor for ACL Injury? A 10-year Population-Based Study.
items.summary: A 10-year population-based study found an association between prior patellofemoral conditions and an increased incidence of ACL injury, suggesting these conditions could be a risk factor.
items.curatedReason: 这项为期 10 年的人群研究提示髌股关节疾病可能是 ACL 损伤的危险因素。这意味着你在评估膝关节不适的年轻活跃个体时，不仅要处理髌股症状，还要关注其是否存在 ACL 损伤的潜在风险，并考虑制定预防策略。
items.titleZh: 髌股关节疾病与 ACL 损伤发生率的关联：髌股关节疾病是否可能是 ACL 损伤的危险因素？一项 10 年基于人群的研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 10 年的人群研究发现，既往髌股关节疾病与 ACL 损伤发生率增加存在关联，提示这些疾病可能是 ACL 损伤的危险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year population-based study suggests that patellofemoral conditions might be a risk factor for ACL injury. This means when evaluating young, active individuals with knee discomfort, you should not only address patellofemoral symptoms but also consider the potential risk of ACL injury and develop preventive strategies.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effect of home-based rehabilitation in frail older adults after cardiac surgery: a prospective feasibility study.
items.summary: A prospective feasibility study found that the Vivifrail home-based, multicomponent exercise program was feasible for frail older adults after cardiac surgery, with 85% adherence.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性可行性研究表明，对接受心脏手术的虚弱老年人进行居家康复是可行的。这为你将 Vivifrail 等多组分运动方案推广到社区和居家环境提供了初步证据。
items.titleZh: 居家康复对心脏手术后虚弱老年人的效果：一项前瞻性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性可行性研究发现，Vivifrail 居家多组分运动方案对心脏手术后虚弱老年人可行，依从性达到 85%。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective feasibility study suggests that home-based rehabilitation is feasible for frail older adults undergoing cardiac surgery. This provides preliminary evidence for you to promote multi-component exercise programs like Vivifrail in community and home settings.

items.title: Influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on functioning: Analytical observational study in community-dwelling older adults.
items.summary: This analytical observational study investigated the influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on the functioning of community-dwelling older adults, underscoring environmental factors as critical determinants of healthy aging.
items.curatedReason: 环境因素对老年人的功能状态影响显著，本研究再次强调了其在健康老龄化中的关键作用。你在制定老年康复计划时，除了关注身体功能，也需将居家环境和社区环境的障碍与促进因素纳入评估和干预考量。
items.titleZh: 环境障碍和促进因素对功能的影响：一项社区居住老年人的分析性观察研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项分析性观察研究调查了环境障碍和促进因素对社区居住老年人功能的影响，强调环境因素是健康老龄化的关键决定因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Environmental factors significantly impact the functional status of older adults, and this study re-emphasizes their critical role in healthy aging. When developing geriatric rehabilitation plans, you should consider environmental barriers and facilitators in both home and community settings, in addition to physical function.

items.title: From robustness to frailty: how post-COVID-19 frailty shapes dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status in post-COVID-19 syndrome.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 45 previously hospitalized subjects with post-COVID-19 syndrome found that post-COVID-19 frailty was significantly associated with worse dyspnea, fatigue, and physical/functional status.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究揭示了 COVID-19 后衰弱与呼吸困难、疲劳及身体功能状态之间的关联。在评估和管理长新冠患者时，应将衰弱作为核心考量因素，因为它可能影响康复预后。
items.titleZh: 从强壮到虚弱：COVID-19 后衰弱如何影响长新冠综合征患者的呼吸困难、疲劳以及身体和功能状态
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 45 例曾住院的长新冠综合征患者的横断面研究发现，COVID-19 后衰弱与更严重的呼吸困难、疲劳以及较差的身体/功能状态显著相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study reveals the association between post-COVID-19 frailty and dyspnea, fatigue, and physical functional status. When assessing and managing long COVID patients, frailty should be a core consideration as it may impact rehabilitation outcomes.

items.title: Effect of a multimodal exercise training program on sleep in older adults: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=60) found that a multimodal exercise training program significantly improved sleep quality in older adults, beyond the benefits seen with single-modality training.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明多模式运动训练可改善老年人睡眠质量。在你的老年康复实践中，除常规有氧和抗阻训练外，可以积极考虑纳入多模式运动，作为改善老年患者整体健康和睡眠的有效手段。
items.titleZh: 多模式运动训练方案对老年人睡眠的影响：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=60）发现，多模式运动训练方案显著改善了老年人的睡眠质量，超越了单一模式训练的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that multimodal exercise training can improve sleep quality in older adults. In your geriatric rehabilitation practice, in addition to conventional aerobic and resistance training, you can actively consider incorporating multimodal exercise as an effective means to improve overall health and sleep in older patients.

items.title: Targeting neuromuscular deficits following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction with spinal manipulation: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A single-blind, randomized controlled trial with 20 ACLR patients found that spinal manipulation significantly altered neuromuscular activation patterns during single-leg vertical drop landing, specifically reducing quadriceps activation (p < 0.05).
items.curatedReason: 脊柱手法治疗可能改善 ACL 重建术后患者单腿垂直跳落地时的神经肌肉激活模式。但这是小样本 RCT，结果别过度解读。将其作为一种辅助手段可以在特定情况下考虑，但不能替代全面的康复训练。
items.titleZh: 脊柱手法治疗对前交叉韧带重建术后神经肌肉缺陷的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 20 例 ACLR 患者的单盲随机对照试验发现，脊柱手法治疗显著改变了单腿垂直跳落地时的神经肌肉激活模式，特别是降低了股四头肌激活（p < 0.05）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Spinal manipulation may improve neuromuscular activation patterns during single-leg vertical drop landing in patients post-ACLR. However, this is a small-sample RCT, so don't over-interpret the results. Consider it as an adjunctive method in specific cases, but it cannot replace comprehensive rehabilitation training.
items.journal: Journal of electromyography and kinesiology : official journal of the International Society of Electrophysiological Kinesiology

items.title: Characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity. An exploratory cross-sectional study from the MOBILIZE trial
items.summary: An exploratory cross-sectional study from the MOBILIZE trial investigated characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity.
items.curatedReason: 对多重共病患者运动疗法和自我管理支持的依从性进行探索性研究。如果你在管理多重共病患者时遇到依从性问题，这份研究为你提供了理解非依从性原因的视角，从而更好地调整干预策略。
items.titleZh: 多重共病患者运动疗法和自我管理支持依从性的特征与原因：一项 MOBILIZE 试验的探索性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: MOBILIZE 试验的一项探索性横断面研究调查了多重共病患者未能参与运动疗法和自我管理支持的特征及原因。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory study investigates adherence to exercise therapy and self-management support among multimorbidity patients. If you encounter adherence issues with multimorbidity patients, this research offers insights into reasons for non-adherence, helping you better adjust intervention strategies.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis
items.summary: This study aims to explore patterns of quality-of-life (QOL) outcomes in diverse rehabilitation patients using latent profile analysis to understand shared experiences across diagnostic groupings.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究通过潜在剖面分析探索了康复患者生活质量结果的模式。这有助于你理解不同诊断分组患者中共享的生命质量体验，从而为他们提供更个性化的康复计划。
items.titleZh: 康复患者生活质量结果的潜在剖面分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在通过潜在剖面分析探索不同康复患者群体生活质量结果的模式，以理解跨诊断分组的共享体验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores patterns of quality-of-life outcomes in rehabilitation patients using latent profile analysis. This helps you understand shared quality-of-life experiences across different diagnostic groups, enabling more personalized rehabilitation plans.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Reducing Recidivism After Traumatic Brain Injury: Results from the Reentry Continuum for Brain Injury (RCBI) Trial
items.summary: The Reentry Continuum for Brain Injury (RCBI) trial examined the effects of an intervention designed to support individuals with traumatic brain injury pending release from prison, focusing on recidivism and behavioral outcomes.
items.curatedReason: RCBI 试验旨在减少 TBI 患者出狱后的再犯率，如果结果积极，这可能意味着你需要在脑损伤康复中，更早地介入社会融入和行为干预，以帮助患者成功重返社会，降低再犯风险。
items.titleZh: 减少创伤性脑损伤后的再犯：脑损伤再融入连续体（RCBI）试验的结果
items.summaryZh: 脑损伤再融入连续体（RCBI）试验旨在检验一项旨在支持创伤性脑损伤患者出狱的干预措施的效果，重点关注再犯率和行为结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: The RCBI trial aims to reduce recidivism rates for TBI patients post-release. If successful, this could imply that you need to intervene earlier with social integration and behavioral interventions in brain injury rehabilitation to help patients successfully re-enter society and reduce re-offense risks.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Development of an Open-Access Action Observation Video Library for Upper Limb Motor Rehabilitation
items.summary: This study reports the development and validation of an open-access action observation video library for upper limb motor rehabilitation, addressing the limited availability of such resources for occupational therapists treating stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究开发了一个开放获取的动作观察视频库，旨在促进中风患者上肢运动康复。如果你在临床中使用动作观察疗法，这个资源可以有效弥补现有视频材料的不足，提高干预的可及性和标准化。
items.titleZh: 开发用于上肢运动康复的开放获取动作观察视频库
items.summaryZh: 本研究报告了用于上肢运动康复的开放获取动作观察视频库的开发和验证，以解决职业治疗师在治疗中风幸存者时此类资源有限的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed an open-access action observation video library to facilitate upper limb motor rehabilitation for stroke survivors. If you use action observation therapy in your clinical practice, this resource can effectively address the scarcity of existing video materials, improving the accessibility and standardization of interventions.

items.title: Sensorimotor recovery and neuropathic pain reduction after remotely delivered cognitive multisensory rehabilitation or remotely delivered exercise in adults with spinal cord injury: a pilot clinical trial.
items.summary: A pilot clinical trial explored the effects of remotely delivered cognitive multisensory rehabilitation or remotely delivered exercise on sensorimotor recovery and neuropathic pain reduction in adults with spinal cord injury, aiming to address deficits in mental body representations.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步临床试验发现远程认知多感官康复或远程运动干预可改善脊髓损伤患者的感觉运动恢复和神经性疼痛。这意味着你可以在远程康复中考虑这两种方法，为脊髓损伤患者提供更灵活和可及的治疗选择，尤其对于那些受限于出行或地理位置的患者。
items.titleZh: 远程认知多感官康复或远程运动干预对脊髓损伤成人感觉运动恢复和神经性疼痛减轻的影响：一项初步临床试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项初步临床试验探讨了远程认知多感官康复或远程运动干预对脊髓损伤成人感觉运动恢复和神经性疼痛减轻的影响，旨在解决心理身体表征方面的缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot clinical trial found that remotely delivered cognitive multisensory rehabilitation or remotely delivered exercise can improve sensorimotor recovery and neuropathic pain in individuals with spinal cord injury. This means you can consider these two approaches in telerehabilitation, offering more flexible and accessible treatment options for SCI patients, especially those with mobility or geographical constraints.

items.title: Developing consensus on competency-based educational standards in orthopaedic manual physical therapy fellowship training: part 2: knowledge for specialty practice and professionalism.
items.summary: This study is part of an effort to develop consensus on competency-based educational standards for Orthopaedic Manual Physical Therapy fellowship training, focusing on knowledge for specialty practice and professionalism.
items.curatedReason: OMPT 专科培训的胜任力标准尚待明确，本研究致力于此，有助你了解和评估该领域高阶培训的预期知识、技能和专业标准。
items.titleZh: 骨科手法物理治疗专科培训能力教育标准共识的制定：第二部分：专科实践和专业素养所需知识
items.summaryZh: 这项研究是旨在制定骨科手法物理治疗专科培训能力教育标准共识的一部分，侧重于专科实践和专业素养所需的知识。
items.curatedReasonEn: Competency standards for OMPT fellowship training are still being defined. This study contributes to that effort, helping you understand and evaluate the expected knowledge, skills, and professional standards for advanced training in this specialty.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Moving Forward Together. Part 5: Championing Physical Therapy Allyship and Advocacy for Indigenous Peoples With Musculoskeletal Pain.
items.summary: The fifth article in the "Moving Forward Together" series explores the role of allyship and advocacy for Indigenous Peoples with musculoskeletal pain, urging physical therapists to address health equity in this population.
items.title: Preventative strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries among male football players: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped the range of preventative strategies used to reduce non-contact lower limb injuries among male footballers, highlighting various approaches.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略。如果你是运动物理治疗师，这份综述为你提供了全面的信息来源，但具体实施仍需基于最新循证指南。
items.titleZh: 男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述梳理了男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略，强调了多种方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review synthesizes preventive strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries in football players. If you are a sports physical therapist, this review provides a comprehensive information source, but specific implementation should still be based on the latest evidence-based guidelines.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Impact of Sociodemographic Variables on Physical Therapist’s Documentation of Physical Activity Levels
items.summary: This study aims to examine how physical therapists document physical activity (PA) and how sociodemographic variables impact this documentation.
items.curatedReason: 研究探讨社会人口学变量如何影响物理治疗师对患者活动水平的记录。这提示你，要警惕这些潜在偏倚，并在日常工作中标准化记录流程，确保评估的客观性和全面性。
items.titleZh: 社会人口学变量对物理治疗师记录身体活动水平的影响
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在考察社会人口学变量如何影响物理治疗师对患者身体活动（PA）的记录。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study examines how sociodemographic variables impact physical therapists' documentation of patient activity levels. This alerts you to potential biases and emphasizes standardizing documentation processes in daily practice to ensure objective and comprehensive assessments.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction using the contralateral knee as an internal control: a National Hospital Episode Statistics database study of 135 881 patients
items.summary: A national hospital database study of 135,881 patients found a significantly increased long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction, using the contralateral knee as an internal control.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于国家数据的研究发现，ACLr 后膝关节置换的长期风险显著增加。这坐实了 ACLr 后关节炎进展的常见性。你应在术后康复中更早地介入关节保护策略和更全面的功能训练，并与患者讨论远期关节健康的潜在风险。
items.titleZh: ACL 重建术后膝关节置换的长期风险，以对侧膝关节作为内部对照：一项针对 135,881 名患者的国家医院病案统计数据库研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 135,881 名患者的国家医院病案统计数据库研究发现，以前交叉韧带重建术后对侧膝关节作为内部对照，术后膝关节置换的长期风险显著增加。
items.curatedReasonEn: This national database study found a significantly increased long-term risk of knee replacement after ACLr. This confirms the common progression to arthritis after ACLr. You should implement joint protection strategies and more comprehensive functional training earlier in post-operative rehabilitation, and discuss the potential long-term joint health risks with patients.

items.title: Effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity following exercise therapy for chronic conditions: an umbrella review
items.summary: An umbrella review investigated the effectiveness of maintenance interventions following exercise therapy on physical activity, physical function, and health-related quality of life in people with chronic conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项伞形综述评估了慢性病患者运动疗法后维持身体活动的干预措施效果。你需要认识到，单纯的运动干预不够，必须有后续的维持策略才能确保患者长期保持身体活动水平，这对你的长期康复计划设计有直接指导意义。
items.titleZh: 运动疗法后促进身体活动的维持干预措施对慢性病患者的有效性：一项伞形综述
items.summaryZh: 一项伞形综述旨在调查运动疗法后维持干预措施对慢性病患者身体活动、身体功能、体适能和健康相关生活质量的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This umbrella review assessed the effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity after exercise therapy for chronic conditions. You need to recognize that exercise intervention alone is insufficient; subsequent maintenance strategies are crucial for patients to sustain physical activity levels long-term. This directly guides your long-term rehabilitation program design.

items.title: Phenomenological exploration of perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors in patients with knee osteoarthritis during physiotherapy rehabilitation in a low- and middle-income country.
items.summary: This qualitative study explores perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors of physiotherapy rehabilitation in knee osteoarthritis patients in a low- and middle-income country, highlighting the influence of lifestyle and contextual factors.
items.curatedReason: 本文呼吁 PT 群体为原住民提供盟友支持和倡导，旨在改善他们的肌肉骨骼健康。作为临床医师，你应该关注原住民群体的健康公平性问题，并思考如何在执业中体现文化敏感性和倡导作用。
items.titleZh: 携手前行。第五部分：为肌肉骨骼疼痛的原住民提供物理治疗盟友支持和倡导
items.summaryZh: “携手前行”系列的第五篇文章探讨了为患有肌肉骨骼疼痛的原住民提供盟友支持和倡导的作用，敦促物理治疗师解决该人群的健康公平问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article calls for PTs to act as allies and advocates for Indigenous Peoples to improve their musculoskeletal health. As a clinician, you should pay attention to health equity issues affecting Indigenous communities and consider how to demonstrate cultural sensitivity and advocacy in your practice.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: How do people with multiple sclerosis who have walking difficulties perceive participation? A qualitative analysis.
items.summary: This qualitative study explores how people with multiple sclerosis and walking difficulties perceive participation, highlighting the subjective aspects of participation not fully captured by frameworks like ICF.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究强调了多发性硬化症患者对参与的独特主观感知，补充了 ICF 框架在临床实践中的不足。在评估和设定康复目标时，你需要将这些主观体验纳入考量，以更好地满足患者需求。
items.titleZh: 有步行困难的多发性硬化症患者如何感知参与？一项定性分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了有步行困难的多发性硬化症患者如何感知参与，突出了 ICF 等框架未能完全涵盖的参与的主观层面。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study highlights the unique subjective perceptions of participation among people with multiple sclerosis, complementing the ICF framework's limitations in clinical practice. When assessing and setting rehabilitation goals, you need to incorporate these subjective experiences to better meet patient needs.

items.title: Effect of home-based rehabilitation in frail older adults after cardiac surgery: a prospective feasibility study.
items.summary: A prospective feasibility study found that a home-based, multicomponent exercise program (Vivifrail) was feasible for frail older adults post-cardiac surgery, aiming to enhance physical performance.
items.curatedReason: 这项可行性研究表明 Vivifrail 住家多组分运动方案对心脏手术后衰弱老年人是可行的。它为你提供了在这一高危人群中实施个性化、家庭康复方案的潜在依据，但仍需大规模 RCT 进一步验证其有效性。
items.titleZh: 心脏手术后衰弱老年人居家康复的效果：一项前瞻性可行性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性可行性研究发现，居家多组分运动方案（Vivifrail）对心脏手术后衰弱老年人是可行的，旨在提高其身体功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study suggests that the home-based multicomponent Vivifrail exercise program is feasible for frail older adults after cardiac surgery. It provides potential justification for implementing personalized, home-based rehabilitation programs in this high-risk population, but large-scale RCTs are still needed to confirm its effectiveness.

items.title: From robustness to frailty: how post-COVID-19 frailty shapes dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status in post-COVID-19 syndrome.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (N=45) examined the relationship between post-COVID-19 frailty and dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status in individuals with post-COVID-19 syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 该研究揭示了新冠后衰弱与呼吸困难、疲劳以及身体和功能状态之间的关联。在处理长期新冠后遗症患者时，你应该关注他们的衰弱程度，并将其作为评估和干预的关键维度。
items.titleZh: 从强健到衰弱：新冠后衰弱如何影响新冠后遗症患者的呼吸困难、疲劳以及身体和功能状态。
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究（N=45）探讨了新冠后衰弱与新冠后遗症患者的呼吸困难、疲劳以及身体和功能状态之间的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals the association between post-COVID-19 frailty and dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status. When treating patients with long COVID, you should assess their frailty level and consider it a key dimension for evaluation and intervention.

items.title: Preventative strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries among male football players: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped the range of preventative strategies used to reduce non-contact lower limb injuries among male footballers, highlighting the complexity and high demands of the sport.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围审查系统性地梳理了男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略。如果你在运动康复领域工作，这些信息可以帮助你设计更全面的损伤预防方案。
items.titleZh: 男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略：一项范围审查。
items.summaryZh: 一项范围审查系统性地梳理了男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略，强调了这项运动的复杂性和高要求。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically outlines preventive strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries in male football players. If you work in sports rehabilitation, this information can help you design more comprehensive injury prevention programs.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Targeting neuromuscular deficits following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction with spinal manipulation: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A single-blind, randomized controlled trial (N=20) investigated the effects of spinal manipulation on neuromuscular activation patterns during single-leg vertical drop landing in individuals with anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR).
items.curatedReason: 这项小样本 RCT 发现脊柱手法可以改善 ACL 重建术后患者单腿垂直跳落时的神经肌肉激活模式。虽然效果有待更大样本验证，但它提示脊柱手法可能作为辅助手段，用于解决 ACLR 后的神经肌肉功能障碍。
items.titleZh: 通过脊柱手法靶向前交叉韧带重建术后的神经肌肉缺陷：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲随机对照试验（N=20）研究了脊柱手法对前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿垂直跳落时神经肌肉激活模式的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This small-sample RCT found that spinal manipulation can improve neuromuscular activation patterns during single-leg vertical drop landing in patients post-ACLR. While the effects need validation in larger samples, it suggests spinal manipulation might serve as an adjunct to address neuromuscular dysfunction after ACLR.
items.journal: Journal of electromyography and kinesiology : official journal of the International Society of Electrophysiological Kinesiology

items.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis
items.summary: This study used latent profile analysis to explore common patterns of quality of life outcomes in diverse rehabilitation patients, aiming to understand shared experiences across diagnostic groupings.
items.curatedReason: 本研究利用潜在剖面分析，识别了康复患者中生活质量结果的共同模式。这提醒你在临床实践中，应超越单一诊断，识别不同患者群体共享的生活质量特征，从而提供更个性化的康复支持。
items.titleZh: 利用潜在剖面分析观察康复患者生活质量结果的剖面
items.summaryZh: 本研究利用潜在剖面分析探索了不同康复患者群体中生活质量结果的常见模式，旨在理解跨诊断组别的共同体验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study used latent profile analysis to identify common patterns of quality of life outcomes in rehabilitation patients. This reminds you to look beyond single diagnoses in clinical practice and identify shared quality of life characteristics across different patient groups, allowing for more personalized rehabilitation support.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Impact of Sociodemographic Variables on Physical Therapist’s Documentation of Physical Activity Levels
items.summary: This study examined how physical therapists document physical activity levels and how sociodemographic variables impact this documentation.
items.curatedReason: 本研究审视了物理治疗师记录身体活动水平的方式及其受社会人口学变量的影响。这提示你在临床实践中，需要更标准化地记录患者的身体活动数据，并警惕潜在的偏见，确保评估的全面性和公平性。
items.titleZh: 社会人口学变量对物理治疗师记录身体活动水平的影响
items.summaryZh: 本研究考察了社会人口学变量如何影响物理治疗师记录身体活动水平的方式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study examines how physical therapists document physical activity levels and the impact of sociodemographic variables. This suggests that in clinical practice, you need to standardize the recording of patient physical activity data and be aware of potential biases to ensure comprehensive and equitable assessment.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Letter to the editor: Pain Catastrophization and Fear of Movement Are Potential Moderators for Response to Treatment in Women With Fibromyalgia: Secondary Analyses of Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A letter to the editor raises serious statistical flaws and concerns about the reliability and validity of results from a secondary analysis of a randomized controlled trial in women with fibromyalgia.
items.curatedReason: 这封致编辑的信函对之前一项纤维肌痛 RCT 的统计缺陷提出了严重质疑。如果你参考过该研究的结论，请重新审视其可靠性，并结合其他高质量证据进行临床决策。
items.titleZh: 致编辑的信：疼痛灾难化和运动恐惧是纤维肌痛女性治疗反应的潜在调节因素：随机对照试验的二次分析
items.summaryZh: 一封致编辑的信函指出，一项针对纤维肌痛女性随机对照试验的二次分析存在严重的统计缺陷，对其结果的可靠性和有效性提出质疑。
items.curatedReasonEn: This letter to the editor raises serious concerns about statistical flaws in a previous fibromyalgia RCT. If you have relied on the conclusions of that study, please re-evaluate its reliability and make clinical decisions based on other high-quality evidence.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 24 studies (n=1298) found exercise interventions significantly reduce pain and improve function, ROM, and strength in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析再次确认运动疗法对于肩袖相关肩痛（RCRSP）是有效的，尤其在中老年患者中。你可以自信地将其作为RCRSP患者的一线干预措施，重点关注疼痛、功能、ROM 和力量的改善。
items.titleZh: 中老年肩袖相关肩痛患者的运动干预：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含 24 项研究（n=1298）的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，运动干预能显著减轻中老年肩袖相关肩痛患者的疼痛，并改善功能、关节活动度及力量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis reaffirms the effectiveness of exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain (RCRSP), especially in middle-aged and older adults. You can confidently position exercise as a first-line intervention for RCRSP, focusing on improving pain, function, ROM, and strength.

items.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.
items.summary: A retrospective comparative effectiveness cohort study of 34,704 acute stroke patients found that rehabilitation in inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) was associated with significantly longer home time compared to skilled nursing facilities (SNFs).
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究显示，急性卒中患者在急性后期入住康复医院（IRFs）而非专业护理机构（SNFs）可获得显著更长的居家时间。这意味着，你应积极倡导将符合条件的卒中患者转诊至 IRFs 进行康复，这能带来更好的功能恢复和独立生活能力。
items.titleZh: 利用急性卒中登记数据比较住院康复机构与专业护理机构康复的有效性
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 34,704 名急性卒中患者的回顾性比较有效性队列研究发现，在住院康复机构（IRFs）进行康复与在专业护理机构（SNFs）相比，能显著延长居家时间。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study shows that acute stroke patients admitted to Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) rather than Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs) post-acutely achieve significantly longer time at home. This means you should actively advocate for referring eligible stroke patients to IRFs for rehabilitation, as it leads to better functional recovery and independent living.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.

items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review comparing early (≤14 days) versus conventional (≥28 days) rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) found no significant differences in functional outcomes or complication rates.
items.curatedReason: 关于反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后康复时机的系统综述指出，早期康复（≤14 天）与传统康复（≥28 天）在功能结局和并发症方面没有显著差异。这提示你可以根据患者个体情况和术中发现来更灵活地安排术后康复启动时间，不必拘泥于延长制动。
items.titleZh: 反式全肩关节置换术后早期与传统康复的功能结局及并发症系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述比较了反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后早期（≤14 天）与传统（≥28 天）康复，发现在功能结局和并发症方面均无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review on reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) post-op rehab timing suggests no significant difference in functional outcomes or complications between early (≤14 days) and conventional (≥28 days) rehabilitation. This allows for greater flexibility in initiating post-op rehab based on individual patient presentation and intraoperative findings, rather than adhering to prolonged immobilization.

items.title: Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) to Recover Arm Activity After Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-blind, randomized, sham-controlled trial (n=30) found that home-based myoelectric interface for neurorehabilitation (MINT) significantly reduced abnormal muscle co-activation and improved arm activity in moderately-to-severely impaired chronic stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 显示，可穿戴式肌电接口神经康复（MINT）设备能显著改善慢性卒中患者的异常肌肉共激活和上肢功能。这提示你，MINT 或许可以作为一种有效的家庭康复工具，在门诊治疗之外提供持续的、以减少共激活为目标的训练。
items.titleZh: 可穿戴式肌电接口神经康复（MINT）用于卒中后手臂活动恢复的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲、随机、假对照试验（n=30）发现，居家肌电接口神经康复（MINT）能显著减少中重度慢性卒中幸存者的异常肌肉共激活，并改善手臂活动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that the Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) device significantly improves abnormal muscle co-activation and arm function in chronic stroke survivors. This suggests MINT could be an effective home-based rehabilitation tool, offering continuous, co-activation-reduction focused training beyond outpatient therapy.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches on pain and function in patients with chronic pain in primary care: a retrospective observational study.
items.summary: A retrospective observational study found that supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches showed comparable effectiveness on pain and function in primary care patients with chronic pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究表明，对于原发性慢性疼痛患者，团体物理治疗在疼痛和功能改善方面与个体化治疗效果相当。在资源有限或需要扩大服务范围时，将团体治疗纳入你的实践是可行且有效的选项。
items.titleZh: 原发性慢性疼痛患者个体、团体及混合物理治疗方案对疼痛和功能影响的比较：一项回顾性观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性观察性研究发现，在原发性慢性疼痛患者中，个体、团体和混合物理治疗方案在改善疼痛和功能方面的有效性相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective observational study indicates that group-based physiotherapy is comparable to individual sessions for pain and function in primary care patients with chronic pain. Consider integrating group therapy into your practice, especially when facing resource constraints or aiming to expand service reach.

items.title: Diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test in individuals with stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) cutoff values in individuals with stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）和 Mini-BESTest 在卒中患者中的诊断和预后准确性。你应该根据临床目的选择合适的量表：BBS 适用于一般平衡能力评估，而 Mini-BESTest 可能在识别特定平衡障碍方面更具优势，并留意其推荐的临界值。
items.titleZh: Berg 平衡量表和 Mini-BESTest 在卒中患者中的诊断和预后准确性：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析调查了 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）和 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test（Mini-BESTest）在卒中患者中临界值的诊断和预后准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis evaluates the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of the Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-BESTest in individuals with stroke. You should select the appropriate scale based on clinical purpose: BBS for general balance assessment, while Mini-BESTest may offer advantages in identifying specific balance impairments, paying close attention to their recommended cutoff values.
